zh.Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France: 法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Dinan於1146年出生在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南時，她的父親Joscleiin de Dinan26歲，母親Sibyl la Lacy22歲。她於大約1160年與Fulk FitzWarin II在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1226年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Dinan于1146年出生在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南时，她的父亲Joscleiin de Dinan26岁，母亲Sibyl la Lacy22岁。她于大约1160年与Fulk FitzWarin II在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1226年在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dinan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (now mainly counties Clare and Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Daghnáin ‘descendant of Daghnán’, possibly a diminutive of dagh ‘good’.
French: habitational name from Dinan, in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany. This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Dineen
meanings: Irish (Cork and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinnín ‘descendant of Duinnín’, a byname from a diminutive of donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Dinan was born in 1146, in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, her father, Joscleiin de Dinan, was 26 and her mother, Sibyl la Lacy, was 22. She married Fulk FitzWarin II about 1160, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1226, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Dinan est née en 1146, à Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, son père, Joscleiin de Dinan, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sibyl la Lacy, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Fulk FitzWarin II environ 1160, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1226, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Dinan 1146 in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Joscleiin de Dinan 26 und ihre Mutter Sibyl la Lacy 22. Sie hat um 1160 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Fulk FitzWarin II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1226 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Dinan è nata il nel 1146 nel Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Joscleiin de Dinan, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Sibyl la Lacy, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Fulk FitzWarin II circa 1160, nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1226, nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Dinanが1146年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーディナンで生まれた時，父Joscleiin de Dinanは26歳，母Sibyl la Lacyは22歳であった。約1160年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンでFulk FitzWarin IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1226年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Dinan(이)가 1146년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 딘아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joscleiin de Dinan(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl la Lacy(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 Fulk FitzWarin II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Whittington, Shropshire, England: Whittington, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Oswestry, Shropshire, England: Oswestry, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Dinan nasceu em 1146, em Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Joscleiin de Dinan, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl la Lacy, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Fulk FitzWarin II aproximadamente 1160, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1226, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Dinan родилась в 1146 г. в местности динан, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Joscleiin de Dinan было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl la Lacy, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fulk FitzWarin II около 1160 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1226 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise de Dinan nació en 1146, en Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Joscleiin de Dinan, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Sibyl la Lacy, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Fulk FitzWarin II aproximadamente 1160, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1226, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
